{{nihongo|'''Kirihara Ishibe Shrine (Teradomari)'''|桐原石部神社（寺泊）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kirihara Ishibe Shrine (Teradomari)'''|桐原石部神社（寺泊）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kirihara Ishibe Shrine (Teradomari)'''|桐原石部神社（寺泊）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kirihara Ishibe Shrine (Teradomari)'''|桐原石部神社（寺泊）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kirihara Ishibe Shrine (Teradomari)'''|桐原石部神社（寺泊）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kirihara Ishibe Shrine (Teradomari)'''|桐原石部神社（寺泊）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kirihara Ishibe Shrine (Teradomari)'''|桐原石部神社（寺泊）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kirihara Ishibe Shrine (Teradomari)'''|桐原石部神社（寺泊）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
